zh.Brecon, Breconshire, Wales: 威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔
zh.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd是Elisedd的兒子，於0885年出生在威爾士。他於大約0922年與Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd在英國威爾斯尼德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於0942年在英國威爾斯安格萊享年57歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.Brecon, Breconshire, Wales: 威尔士布雷康史爾布雷孔
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd是Elisedd的儿子，于0885年出生在威尔士。他于大约0922年与Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd在英国威尔斯尼德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于0942年在英国威尔斯安格萊享年57岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Elise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: short form of   Elisabeth .  The name was introduced into the English-speaking world (where it is often written without the accent) in the late 19th century and has become fairly popularity in recent years.

variants.name: Elisa
meanings: short form of   Elisabeth .  The name was introduced into the English-speaking world (where it is often written without the accent) in the late 19th century and has become fairly popularity in recent years.

en.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd was born in 0885, in Wales as the son of Elisedd. He married Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd about 0922, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 0942, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd est né en 0885, à Galles, fils d’Elisedd. Il a épousé Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd environ 0922, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 0942, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd wurde 0885 in Wales, als Sohn von Elisedd geboren. Er hat um 0922 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 0942 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd è nato il nel 0885 nel Galles come figlio di Elisedd. Lui sposato Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd circa 0922, nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 0942, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwyneddは0885年にウェールズでEliseddの息子として生まれた。約0922年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドでQueen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwyneddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は0942年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで57歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd(은)는 0885년 웨일스에서 Elisedd의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 0922년 영국 웨일스 그w이네드에서 Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 0942년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd nasceu em 0885, em Gales filho de Elisedd. Ele casou-se com Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd aproximadamente 0922, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 0942, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd родился в 0885 г. в местности Уэльс. Его отца звали Elisedd. Он женился на женщине по имени Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd около 0922 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 0942 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Prince Elise Ap Anarawd de Gwynedd nació en 0885, en Gales como hijo de Elisedd. Se casó con Queen Mereddon verch Cadwr of Gwynedd aproximadamente 0922, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 0942, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Gales, Reino Unido.
